title: DB's Minecraft PLUS
description: A collection of mods that improve every aspect of Minecraft, while keeping a vanilla feel. Mods enhance the UI, Sounds, QOL, Exploration and plenty more.
body:
A collection of mods that enhance every aspect of Minecraft, while keeping the vanilla feel.

For enhancing the UI we have compact font, tiny item animations, Flow, Sounds, Better F1, Better F3, Held Item Info, Better Enchanted Books, Colourful Containers and many more.

For exploration the mods include Geophilic, Explorify and Hearths which enhance the biomes, structures and nether biomes respectively.

For QOL I've included Better Anvils, Better Magic and Better Shulker Boxes. We also have leaves be gone, the bridging mod and better than mending.

Mods that require a link in description: 

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric

https://vanillatweaks.net
